name: Cajun Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup very fine dry bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bay leaves, salt, cayenne pepper, black pepper, white pepper, cumin, and nutmeg. Set aside.
2. Melt butter over medium heat. Add onions, celery, green onions, garlic, Tabasco sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and the combined seasonings. Sauté the mixture until it starts sticking excessively, about 6 minutes, stirring occasionally and scraping the bottom well.
3. Stir in milk and ketchup. Continue cooking about 2 more minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Allow the mixture to cool.
5. In a baking pan, mix ground beef and pork. Add eggs, cooked vegetable mixture, and bread crumbs. Mix by hand until thoroughly combined.
6. Shape the mixture into a loaf in the center of the pan.
7. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 25 minutes. Raise the heat to 400°F and continue cooking for an additional 35 minutes longer.
